description_long: This object consists of a nested set of three frying pans, each with a round, shallow body and a long, straight handle. The pans are primarily black with a deep red hue visible on the handles and outer surfaces, giving them a sleek, modern appearance. The handles are solid, straight, and appear to be made of metal or coated with a heat-resistant material, each featuring a hole at the end for hanging. The rims of the pans are slightly raised and smooth, with no visible pouring spouts or reinforced edges. The bottoms of the pans are not fully visible, but they appear to be flat and smooth, likely designed for even heat distribution. No brand logos or markings are visible on any part of the pans or handles.
description: A nested set of three black and red frying pans with straight handles and smooth, slightly raised rims. The handles have hanging holes and the pans have a modern, metallic finish.
description_view_0: Three frying pans stacked together, showing the side profile and the full length of the straight, red handles.
description_view_1: A direct view of the pan set from the handle ends, highlighting the circular nesting and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: A side angle showing the stacked pans and the curvature of the handles, with the red color more prominent.
description_view_3: A view from the handle side, showing the handles' alignment and the holes at their ends.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, solid handles made of metal or polymer, with a smooth finish and a hole at the end for hanging.
attribute_rim_design: Smooth, slightly raised, straight rim with no pouring spouts or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Flat and smooth bottom surface with no visible pattern or markings.
